name: Omni Viewer
description: View audio, image, video, archive, csv, DBC, ARXML, A2L, ASC, BLF, MF4, Avro, ROS bag, PCAP, PCAPNG, STEP, DB3, ReqIF, excel, word, powerpoint, parquet, Shapefile, HDF5, MAT, jsonl, yaml, toml, markdown, mermaid, PlantUML, hwp, PSD and PDF files inside Obsidian.
